ceo.directive: Regime GREEN (0/5 red). Constructive: catalysts & momentum earn more weight.
lessons_applied: Cold start: no aged picks with prices yet — no lessons. The loop will learn once picks mature (~2+ weeks of history).

top_day.why: 2 insiders put personal cash into SLMT (Services-Amusement & Recreation Services). Clustered open-market buys are the strongest documented edge — insiders sell for many reasons but buy for only one.

Fresh $3089M federal award to LEIDOS, INC. (Services-Computer Integrated Systems Design). New contracts can lift revenue guidance — watch for analyst upgrades next. Note: USAspending lags the press release by days.
